name: policy-authoring
description: Reusable policy and requirements authoring skills for building, editing, auditing, and rendering UC/PR/FN/sub-function and PG/PI policy specs.

interface.longDescription: Five reusable skills for policy and requirements authoring: hierarchy decomposition, naming readability, policy-detail authoring, integrity audit, and new-module setup. The bundled Python tools use a canonical spec JSON and policy_config.json so the workflow can move across project folders and source formats.
defaultPrompt: Use Policy Authoring to set up a new policy module.
Audit this policy spec for ID integrity.
Rewrite these policy details with tables and review flags.
